[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11010001 4
1 00010010 2
2 10110010 4
3 10010110 4
4 10100101 4
5 11110111 7
6 00110100 3
7 00110101 4

67 11111111 a
70 11111110 7
